name: karpathy
description: Operationalizes Andrej Karpathy's LLM-coding principles as Claude Code tools. /karpathy:audit reviews agent instruction files and can include configured stale-doc/index checks; /karpathy:setup configures those audit checks; /karpathy:diff reviews in-progress code changes before commit; /karpathy:wiki creates and maintains a local repo knowledge base for task briefs, Q&A, stale reminders, and wiki health checks. Reports first and applies fixes only on approval.
